creator: andrej.zverev@gmail.com
text:
2.8.9 is a new security release.
	http://blog.openx.org/05/openx-source-289-security-release/

--- openx.diff begins here ---
Index: ports/www/openx/Makefile
===================================================================

retrieving revision 1.11
diff -u -r1.11 Makefile
--- ports/www/openx/Makefile	2 Mar 2012 21:31:11 -0000	1.11
+++ ports/www/openx/Makefile	4 Jul 2012 07:45:01 -0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	openx
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.8
+PORTVERSION=	2.8.9
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.openx.org/
